column1: Hey Edan, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book!
I was looking to get prices for Cabo and Punta
Okay cool yea both are dope Cabo is a little more expensive. I'll personally be in Punta cana
How many ppl in your group so far?
yoo Edan did you have an estimate on how many ppl you'd be rollin with? i'll send over the options
word thats solid. which school you all from?
fire yea we got a couple Rutgers groups rollin with us. gonna be a good time
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if it came through
Showed my boys I'll lyk asap
bet bet yea lmk what they think
yoo Edan whats good, how we feelin about those options so far?
My boys are still figuring it out they gonns let me know tn

sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
